name: Deluxe Chocolate Marshmallow Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar in a mixing bowl.
2. Add eggs and vanilla; beat until fluffy.
3. Combine flour, baking powder, salt, and baking cocoa; add to the creamed mixture. Stir in chopped nuts if desired.
4. Spread the batter evenly in a greased jelly roll pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 15-18 minutes.
6. Sprinkle marshmallows evenly over the cake; return to oven for 2-3 minutes.
7. Using a knife dipped in water, spread melted marshmallows evenly over the cake.
8. Cool completely.
9. For topping, melt chocolate chips (1 1/3 cups) and butter (3 tbsp) in a small saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly until well blended.
10. Remove from heat; stir in cereal (2 cups).
11. Spread topping over bars.
12. Chill before serving.
Yield: about 3 dozen
